title: pelargonium × crataegifolium
intro: Pelargonium × crataegifolium, also known as Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the pelargonium family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × crataegifolium include alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reducing inflammation, and providing relief from stomach ulcers and other gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × crataegifolium often involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used as a topical application for skin issues.
